subject: docs(audit): retrospective rollup — HISTORY, SESSION_NOTES, TODO.md
body:
Fourth-pass documentation rollup. Records the retrospective pass
itself so a future session can trace the full 4-pass history from
the docs without git-log spelunking.

- **docs/HISTORY.md** — new "Retrospective pass — tripwire invariants,
  file-size findings, index.html scope" section at the top of the
  2026-04-15 entry. Paragraph-per-commit for the 4 retrospective
  commits (a7a9126 tripwire, 460e161 file-size TODOs, 57e2423
  CLAUDE.md scope note, this commit). New subsection "Verified
  invariants at the end of the retrospective" captures the
  assumptions I re-checked:

    * `<body class="font-sans">` redundancy verified via Tailwind v4
      preflight chain; documented that the OLD `* { font-family }`
      rule was a latent bug that overrode preflight's monospace
      for `<code>` / `<kbd>` / `<samp>` / `<pre>`. Nobody noticed
      but the 2026-04-15 removal fixed it.
    * DaisyUI v5 `:root, [data-theme]` base rule re-verified still
      emitted by `node_modules/daisyui/base/rootcolor.css` so the
      body bg/color removal (commit 39cd3cf) holds across version
      upgrades.
    * Repo-wide inline-style / bracket-value / hex-literal greps
      confirmed no regressions beyond the documented allowlists.

- **docs/SESSION_NOTES.md** — new "Fourth pass — retrospective +
  tripwire strengthening" section with 4-commit summary. The
  "Current file-size posture" subsection expanded to include the
  three newly-found over-limit files (pwa.js, aggregate-processed.js,
  extract-api.js), each labelled with their limit classification
  (soft / strong). Tripwire test file line count noted with a
  "test files are exempt" convention note.

  The "Open Items For Next Session" section rewritten from
  scratch — the previous version had two stale bullets left over
  from an earlier session (duplicate "Live browser verification of
  the SettingsPane radio + UTC toggle" + a truncated "documenting."
  sentence fragment). Now lists just (1) browser verification that
  I can't do without a browser, (2) the three file-size splits
  flagged in TODO.md, (3) pointer to TODO.md for the long tail.

- **docs/TODO.md** footer — rewritten to describe all four audit
  passes (13 + 8 + 6 + 4 = 31 audit commits total, plus 14 earlier
  pre-audit commits on the branch = 45 total branch commits). Final
  exception count: 8, each with a stated rationale. Test count: 63.

Build clean, 63/63 tests pass.

Tags: documentation, audit, retrospective
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: post-audit-cleanup
Semver: patch
